productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Adi T Tennis White Casual Shoes
description: Sharing the simple look and feel of the archival table tennis and plimsole shoe, the Adi T Tennis shoe from adidas originals blends the retro and modern to create a comfortable and stylish footwear.UpperFull grain leather upper for supple comfort Lacing system with tonal black eyelets for a snug, customised FitPadded collar for optimum fitTextile inner lining with a cushioned footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage styleOutsoleVulcanised rubber outsole with herringbone grooves and a pivot point on the big toe mound for absolute grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if necessaryDo not store in direct sunlight
